## **TZ1.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ1.3.1. NAV PORTUGAL NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE PORTUGAL CONTINENTAL TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

NAV Portugal reported a net gain of +2.1 M€, as a combination of a gain of +2.0 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -0.4 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +0.5 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **TZ1.3.2. NAV PORTUGAL OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARING ZONE** 

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+2.1 M€) and the actual RoE (+0.6 M€), amounts to +2.6 M€ (5.3% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 24.4%, which is higher than the 5.3% planned in the PP.

### **TZ1.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
